endpoints.name: Get the directions, path, distance and travel time between a series of geographic points
endpoints.description: Represents the turn-by-turn directions, geometry, distance, and time of the shortest path or fastest path between given start and end points
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY. Replace {{OUTPUTFORMAT}} with a real outputformat.

endpoints.name: Get the directions, path, distance and travel time between a series of geographic points
endpoints.description: Represents the turn-by-turn directions, geometry, distance, and time of the shortest path or fastest path between given start and end points
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY. Replace {{OUTPUTFORMAT}} with a real outputformat.

endpoints.name: Get distance and travel time between two geographic points
endpoints.description: Represents the distance and time of the shortest or fastest path between given start and end points.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY. Replace {{OUTPUTFORMAT}} with a real outputformat.

endpoints.name: Get distance and travel time between two geographic points
endpoints.description: Represents the distance and time of the shortest or fastest path between given start and end points.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY. Replace {{OUTPUTFORMAT}} with a real outputformat.

endpoints.name: Get distance and travel time between each pair of geographic points
endpoints.description: Represents the distance and time of the shortest or fastest paths between all pairs of fromPoints and toPoints. The number of fromPoints times the number of toPoints should not exceed 100 or the request will time out.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY. Replace {{OUTPUTFORMAT}} with a real outputformat.

endpoints.name: Get distance and travel time between each pair of geographic points
endpoints.description: Represents the distance and time of the shortest or fastest paths between all pairs of fromPoints and toPoints. The number of fromPoints times the number of toPoints should not exceed 100 or the request will time out.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY. Replace {{OUTPUTFORMAT}} with a real outputformat.

endpoints.name: Get the directions, optimal path, distance and travel time between a start point and a series of end points which are reordered to minimize total distance or time.

endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY. Replace {{OUTPUTFORMAT}} with a real outputformat.
